text:
Created attachment 189217
Update cacti to 1.1.29

Update cacti to 1.1.29

Committer: please ignore portlint warning regarding gettext, cacti has internal gettext support so does not require gettext.

This release does not reference any CVEs so no merge-quarterly required.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.4/11.1 i386/amd64 at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.29/
